subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam! Hearken unto the call of this Youth. By God, He hath never vaunted Himself over any among His servants, but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام اسمع ندآء  هذالغلام  تالله انه ماافتخر علی احد من العباد ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
